title: Microbial Biotechnology Research Laboratory

Today, the fact that the industrial areas where enzymes are used have increased considerably, the amount of pure enzymes produced using microorganisms has reached a value of 500 tons per year and the economic value of the products formed is very high has brought along the importance of studies in this field day by day. Although microorganisms are used in the production of approximately 200 of the 4,000 enzymes used in various sectors, only 20 enzymes are produced on an industrial scale. On the other hand, world enzyme demand is met by approximately 12 large producers and 400 small suppliers.

Microbial Biotechnology

Laboratory

established with the support of Istanbul Development Agency to eliminate our country's foreign dependence in the enzyme sector;

Exploration of new resources,

Generation of new technologies,

R&D and creation of innovative applications,

Contribution to the industrial enzyme sector and studies on protein molecules

It is a laboratory established for this purpose within Üsküdar University, which aims to pioneer University - Industry cooperation and works as a candidate to be a pioneer in the field of bio-innovation.

Microbial Biotechnology Laboratory Equipment

Tube Shaker-Shaker/Heidolph (Hei-MIX Reax top),

Shaking graduated water bath/NUVE brand (ST 30),

Pure Water Device/ELGA (Purelab option-Q 7/15),

Upright Laboratory Steam Sterilizer/NUVE brand (OT 40L/90L),

Evaporator system/BUCHI brand (Recirculating Chiller F-100/F-105, Interface I-100, Vacuum pump V-100, Rotavapor R-100),

Power Supply/GWINSTEK (DC Power Supply GPS-S Series),

Ice machine/Scotsman (AF/EF Series),

37°C Multi-Stack Incubator with Shaker/DAIHAN Scientific (WIS-ML Model),

Bioreactor/INFORS HT,

High resolution data logger/ Pico technology,

Microcomputer Thermostat Serial/Ewelly (EW-988 Model),

Data Processing Computer/AOC (Model 931SWL),

+4°C Refrigerator/VESTEL (21 GT/SN1001V A+ Model).

Main Research Topics Conducted in Microbial Biotechnology Laboratory

Microbial enzymes and proteins,

Enzymes and secondary metabolites for food, pharmaceutical and cosmetic industries,

Antimicrobial drugs,

Microbial proteins.
